notes: Dinner menu captured with smaller plates, shareables, and mains. Daily specials, drinks, full wine/spirits lists, dessert, and kids menu were listed as tabs but content was not included in the raw text — skipped. Dietary tags GF/V/VGN/DF appear on the menu; DF (dairy-free) is not a standard tag in the schema and has been omitted from dietary_tags.
